title: Nucore: Foundation
description: Nucore: Foundation is the foundation of the mod-series Nucore.
body:
Nucore: Foundation is a mod-series based around industrialization and nuclear processes. Nucore: Foundation is just the basics and foundation for the many mods that follow that includes automation, industry, and more!

Nucore: Foundation includes:

- Many of the ores used in the mod-series
- Some systems that will be used
- Some libraries to help make the other mods

This doesent sound like much because it isnt! Because Nucore: Foundation aka. NF is the basics to the other exiting mods!
